title: Healthcare System, Health

vocabulary.meaning: financial protection that helps pay for treatment
medical care given to help a patient
an arranged time to see a doctor
a serious situation needing immediate help
provided by the government for everyone

questions: How does your healthcare system work? Who pays the doctors? What percentage does the patient pay for care? What percentage does the government or insurance pay?
Is your healthcare system fair? Do smokers or heavy drinkers pay more for care? Do old and young people pay equally for healthcare? Should everyone pay an equal amount for healthcare?
What do you think about your system? Why is it good? Why is it bad? How qualified are your healthcare workers?
What changes need to be made? Should healthcare workers be paid more money? Do you need more doctors in your country? Are there enough hospitals to assist the sick people?
How can we extend people's lives? What is the infant mortality rate in your country? What is the average life span?
